metadata.title:
Local LDdr Probable


In Labor Bodies.

pages.raw_text:
The demand contained in the re-
vision of the constitution and bylaws
of the trades council that all unions
DESTROYS of affiliating with that body
must organize under the American
Federation of Labor has stirred up
the fighting blood of the American
Labor union, and many of those who
are connected with the A. F. of L..
declare that they will take a firm
stand against the adoption of the
new constitution as it reads now.


Even some members of the commit
tee on constitution and bylaws are
arrayed on the side of the A. l.. IT,,
although they reported at the last
meeting of the council unanimously
in favor of the revision.


Il. Il. Potts, one of that commit
toe, says that the proposed change
in the constitution has been radically
altered by someone since the COM
mittee voted upon it. He absolutely
denies that they passed upon the
clause which has given rise to the
feeling of bitterness between the two
national bodies and that. in fact. such
"a clause was never called to their
attention. but was inserted there
after the committee had reported.


T.. f. Quinn, also one of the COM
mittee. takes strong exceptions to
the denial of Mr.. Potts. He says
that not only was the disputed clause
voted favorably upon, but that he
himself formulated 1t and that ii was
discussed by the committee at con-
siderable length. Horace Brown sup
ports the statements of Mr.. Quinn.
When the unions report back to
Is expected that one of the most bit
ter fractional fights that ever agitatcd
labor body will inevitable ensue.
and that it may result in determining
the survival of the attest.


Should the trades council uphold
the interests of the American Fed
GRAFTON of Labor one of the outcomes
will be that another council manned
by the American Labor union will
spring into existence. and then the
history of Denver will be repeated in
Spokane.


The difficulty will not, however, re-
tard the progress OF organized labor
In this city. for. should the occa-
sion ever present itself. the two
